'''Renikco''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]]-maintenance company used as a front for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] operations on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Jaemus/Legends|Jaemus]]. The company was tasked with converting [[Tech 4 PDV]]s to transport units for [[Death-Hunter Cyborg]]s.<ref name="DH" />

{{Company-stub}}
